value: I understand how frustrating this must be—a week-long delay is definitely not the experience we want you to have. To help get this resolved quickly, could you share a bit more detail about what's happened? Specifically, is this a delivery delay with Amazon, or is there an issue with your order itself? Once I understand the situation better, I'll do everything I can to help move this forward and make sure you get your OnePlus 5T.
